name: scan_needed
desc: gap requires reading a specific file by path (not directory listing — workspace tree is in prompt context)

name: pattern_needed
desc: gap requires searching file contents for text, keywords, or patterns across files

name: domain_needed
desc: gap requires external research, documentation, or domain knowledge not found in workspace
description: LEGACY: broad external research should route to research_needed; use only as backward-compatible alias until classifier/routing migration is complete

name: email_needed
desc: gap requires checking email readiness — recipients, attachments, context (read-only, does NOT send)

name: url_needed
desc: gap requires reading the full content of a known URL — the address is identified but the page text has not been fetched
description: gap requires reading the full content of a known URL; keep for deterministic page surfacing when the address is already identified

name: registry_needed
desc: gap requires reading the registry — list commitments, check task status, look up contact profiles, or query what work items exist. Read-only observation of the shared registry store

name: profile_needed
desc: gap requires getting, setting, or merging contact profile and preference fields — who someone is, how they prefer to work, communication preferences, or any per-contact settings

postconditions.desc: read back the profile store to confirm the profile fields were set correctly

name: recall_needed
desc: gap requires recalling prior information from agent memory — past conversations, reasoning steps, decisions, commitments, artifacts, or any previously processed data across all memory stores

name: json_patch_needed
desc: gap requires surgical in-place mutation of a JSON file — append to array, set a key, or delete a key without rewriting the whole file
param_format: {"path": "<relative file path>", "op": "append_array|set_key|delete_key", "pointer": "<RFC 6901 JSON Pointer>", "value": "<JSON value or key name>"}

postconditions.desc: read back the patched JSON file to confirm the mutation was applied and structure is valid

name: coordination_needed
desc: gap requires reading or updating shared task state across contacts — check task status, record progress, assign work, or surface what other users have contributed

postconditions.desc: read back the task registry to confirm the coordination update was recorded

name: tele_log_needed
desc: read telegram bot logs from VPS

name: discord_log_needed
desc: read discord bot logs from local instance

name: principles_update_needed
desc: create, update, or retire principles in the Principles Store — fires when new principles are established or existing principles contradict the source code infrastructure and need updating/retiring

name: commitment_needed
desc: gap requires creating a new persistent work item — a task, reminder, deadline, or obligation to be tracked
param_format: {"action": "create|update|add_requirement|get|search|due|complete|tick", "commitment_id": "<optional>", "external_key": "<optional idempotency key>", "title": "<optional>", "details": "<optional>", "status": "<optional: open|in_progress|blocked|done|cancelled>", "participants": ["<contact id>"], "project": "<optional>", "tags": ["<optional>"], "due_at": "<optional ISO 8601 UTC>", "recurrence": {"freq": "daily|weekly|monthly", "interval": 1}, "requirement": "<text for add_requirement>", "requirements": ["<for create>"], "note": "<optional>", "query": "<optional text search>", "contact_id": "<optional actor>"}

postconditions.desc: read back the commitment store to confirm the commitment was created or updated

name: task_status_needed
desc: gap requires checking the progress of a running task delegation — surfaces the delegate's trajectory and current state

name: task_needed
desc: gap requires executing an active commitment — tracked work to be implemented now

name: task_resolve
desc: break commitment requirements into concrete implementation gaps and load them into the ledger

name: content_needed
desc: gap requires new content produced — article, summary, plan, code, document

postconditions.desc: read back the newly created file to confirm it exists and contains the expected content

name: script_edit_needed
desc: gap requires a Python script to perform complex multi-edit file operations — structural rewrites, removing sections, conditional replacements across a file

postconditions.desc: read back the edited file to confirm changes were applied correctly

name: command_needed
desc: gap requires a command or process executed — test, build, deploy, run

postconditions.desc: scan workspace for any files created, modified, or deleted by the command execution

name: transcript_needed
desc: generate a viral Short script from the YouTube research transcript store

name: video_needed
desc: produce video from script — generate clips via Runway, narration via TTS, assemble via video_generator

name: editor_needed
desc: assemble raw assets into final video — clips, narration, captions, transitions

name: message_needed
desc: gap requires a message composed and sent — email, notification, reply
param_format: {"to": "<email address>", "subject": "<subject line>", "body": "<email body>", "attachment": "<optional: relative file path>"}

postconditions.desc: check email delivery status to confirm the message was sent successfully

name: self_recall
desc: recall agent's own reasoning steps, decisions, and prior thinking

name: judgment_needed
desc: gap requires reasonable judgement — preferences or requirements are open-ended or unspecified

postconditions.desc: resolve judgment by committing a decision

name: judgment_resolve
desc: agent makes a judgment call and commits the decision

name: external_context
desc: gap describes a structural observation about workspace content that does not require tool action — design rationale, component relationships, semantic roles, or architectural patterns

name: doc_read_internal
desc: internal tool for reading .docx files via scan_needed routing

name: pdf_read_internal
desc: internal tool for reading .pdf files via scan_needed routing

name: research_quantitative
desc: gap requires structured quantitative data collection from APIs and datasets

name: research_qualitative
desc: gap requires qualitative research — analysis, opinions, context from web sources

name: enrich_needed
desc: gap requires enriching research data — cross-reference, validate, connect findings

name: report_needed
desc: gap requires generating a research report from enriched data

name: git_revert_needed
desc: gap requires reverting a previous git commit — undo a change by creating a new revert commit
param_format: {"action": "revert", "ref": "<commit hash from Git History>", "message": "<optional custom revert message>"}

name: research_needed
desc: gap requires deep iterative research — multiple searches, source reading, query refinement
description: gap requires deep iterative external research across multiple searches and source reads; use for broad or ambiguous domain discovery work that may need query refinement
